smartGlove.title: Smart Glove from Mednova
smartGlove.desc: A smart device to help you recover hand movement at home with ease and efficiency.

features.title: Home Use
features.desc: No need to visit a center

smartGlove.cta: Learn more about the smart glove

hero.title: The smart medical glove from
hero.description: An advanced rehabilitation device designed to restore hand movement in a practical, smart, and customizable way. It supports patients after stroke, hemiplegia, muscle atrophy, seniors, and children—at centers or at home.

howItWorks.title: How does the smart glove work?
howItWorks.subtitle: An integrated system combining smart hardware and a digital platform for rehabilitation.

howItWorksSteps.title: Initial assessment
howItWorksSteps.description: Assess the patient and define the right therapy plan.

howItWorksSteps.title: Glove setup
howItWorksSteps.description: Program the glove for the patient through the digital platform.

howItWorksSteps.title: Therapy sessions
howItWorksSteps.description: Run tailored exercises with precise control of each finger.

howItWorksSteps.title: Follow-up & tuning
howItWorksSteps.description: Track progress and adjust the program based on treatment response.

platform.description: A complete system linking the smart glove, patient, and therapist with smart analytics and detailed reports.

features.title: Therapy program tuning
features.description: Specialists configure programs according to each patient’s condition.

features.title: Motor progress tracking
features.description: Monitor and analyze progress in real time with rich detail.

features.title: AI-powered reports
features.description: Analyze data and deliver smart recommendations for therapy.

benefitsSection.title: Benefits of the smart glove
benefitsSection.subtitle: An integrated system that supports everyone involved in care.

faqSection.title: Frequently asked questions
faqSection.subtitle: Answers to the most common questions about the smart glove.

faq.question: What is the Mednova smart glove?
faq.answer: An advanced rehabilitation device that restores hand movement for patients with weakness or paralysis from stroke, hemiplegia, muscle atrophy, or aging.

faq.question: Can the glove be used at home?
faq.answer: Yes. It is designed for home use with remote follow-up through the Mednova digital platform.

faq.question: How is the therapy program customized?
faq.answer: Specialists configure rehabilitation programs on the platform—movement angles, exercise intensity, and session length are tailored to each patient.

faq.question: How effective is the glove?
faq.answer: Studies show notable hand mobility gains with consistent use; progress is tracked live and analyzed with AI.

faq.question: Is the glove suitable for children?
faq.answer: Yes. Multiple sizes fit all ages, with programs designed specifically for children.
